overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through a sunlit grassland and pine forest. A horse-drawn covered wagon briefly passes by as the character continues toward rocky cliff formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland meadow with scattered pine trees

agents.ego_description: cowboy character walking steadily along dirt path through sunlit grassland

entered.detail: massive boulder formation with rough texture on left side of trail
tall evergreen trees scattered across the meadow
worn dirt path with grass growing in the middle
tall green and golden grass covering the ground
large rocky cliffs and outcrops visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through an open grassland meadow bathed in bright sunlight. A large rock outcrop dominates the left side while scattered pine trees dot the landscape leading toward distant rocky formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail transition with wagon crossing

events.description: horse-drawn covered wagon enters from right and crosses the path moving left

agents.ego_description: continuing along forest trail as wagon passes by from right to left

notable_agents.action: covered wagon pulled by two horses moving from right to left across the path

changed.to: dense forest lining both sides of trail

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a denser pine forest with dappled sunlight. A covered wagon pulled by horses crosses the path from right to left. The open grassland and large rock formation disappear behind as the character moves deeper into the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest with rocky cliff faces

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the shaded forest toward the rocky cliffs ahead

entered.detail: tall gray rock formation rising on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the dense pine forest where the trail becomes more enclosed. A rocky cliff face rises prominently on the right while the distant rock formations draw closer ahead. The wagon is no longer visible as the path winds deeper into the wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open grassland meadow into the enclosed depths of a dense pine forest. It begins with the character walking along a sunlit dirt trail beside a large rock outcrop, with scattered pines leading toward distant rocky formations. As the path enters the forest, the open meadow and rock outcrop disappear behind the character, and the lighting shifts to dappled sunlight as a horse-drawn covered wagon crosses the trail from right to left. The scene then tightens as the character moves deeper into the wilderness, with the trail becoming more enclosed and a prominent rocky cliff face rising on the right. Finally, the camera continues forward as the distant rock formations draw closer, leaving the wagon behind in the thickening woods.
